scripts.check: pnpm run build && pnpm -r --sort run check
scripts.ci: pnpm run check && pnpm run test && pnpm run harness:smoke && pnpm run harness:web-security && pnpm run harness:migrations && pnpm run harness:compose-env && pnpm run compose:config
scripts.compose:config: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml config --quiet && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.prod.yml config --quiet && docker compose --profile interop --profile imaging -f infra/docker-compose.yml config --quiet
